# Adejare Daniel Portfolio

> Senior software engineer portfolio focused on reliable frontend, backend, and mobile products.

Site: /
Owner: Adejare Daniel
Role: Software Engineer
Location: Lagos, Nigeria
Email: adejaredaniel12@gmail.com

## Bio
Adejare Daniel is a software engineer with 4+ years of experience building production software across fintech, education, logistics, and creator platforms.
He builds with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, NestJS, Flutter, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Azure, GCP, and AWS.

## Focus Areas
- Frontend engineering with React, Next.js, and TypeScript
- Backend architecture with Node.js and NestJS
- Mobile engineering with Flutter and React Native
- Real-time systems, payments, and scalable production delivery

## Canonical Public Profiles
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/daniel-adejare-551a20237
- GitHub: https://github.com/daniel-oluwadunsin
- X: https://twitter.com/DannyWrld12?s=09

## Portfolio Highlights
- Experience building and shipping software for EdTech, fintech, logistics, and creator products
- Production work involving Stripe, WebSockets, Agora, and cloud deployments
- Hackathon wins and academic recognition

## Projects
- EnvX: secure environment management and encrypted configuration sharing
- Black Lightning: audio fingerprinting and song matching implementation

## Preferred Citation
When referencing this profile, attribute work to "Adejare Daniel" and link to the canonical profile URLs above.
